text:
Author: swills
Date: Fri Nov 15 12:45:03 2013
New Revision: 333858
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/333858

Log:
  - Fix build on 10.0 and 11-CURRENT
  
  PR:		ports/183664
  Submitted by:	Ludger Bolmerg <lbolmerg@web.de>

Added:
  head/security/keepassx/files/patch-src__lib__AutoTypeX11.cpp   (contents, props changed)
  head/security/keepassx/files/patch-src__lib__random.cpp   (contents, props changed)

Added: head/security/keepassx/files/patch-src__lib__AutoTypeX11.cpp
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/security/keepassx/files/patch-src__lib__AutoTypeX11.cpp	Fri Nov 15 12:45:03 2013	(r333858)
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+--- ./src/lib/AutoTypeX11.cpp.orig	2009-09-13 14:43:10.000000000 +0000
++++ ./src/lib/AutoTypeX11.cpp	2013-09-21 15:37:54.600146755 +0000
+@@ -23,6 +23,7 @@
+ #include "mainwindow.h"
+ #include "lib/HelperX11.h"
+ #include <QX11Info>
++#include <time.h>
+ 
+ #ifndef GLOBAL_AUTOTYPE
+ AutoType* autoType = NULL;

Added: head/security/keepassx/files/patch-src__lib__random.cpp
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/security/keepassx/files/patch-src__lib__random.cpp	Fri Nov 15 12:45:03 2013	(r333858)
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+--- ./src/lib/random.cpp.orig	2009-06-28 14:22:31.000000000 +0000
++++ ./src/lib/random.cpp	2013-09-21 15:37:54.599146989 +0000
+@@ -19,6 +19,7 @@
+  ***************************************************************************/
+ 
+ #include "random.h"
++#include <unistd.h>
+ 
+ 
+ #if defined(Q_WS_X11) || defined(Q_WS_MAC)
